fields.text: Crafting Rules
Classic craft: use the listed Magic base, Jewel, Rune and Perfect Gem.
Tablet shortcut: Magic base + matching Crafting Tablet -> same family craft.
Augmented version: add Eth Rune + Charsi's Malus to a classic, tablet or Ascended craft.
Classic Crafts
Blood Amulet: Magic Amulet + Jewel + Amn Rune + Perfect Ruby
Blood Belt: Magic Belt + Jewel + Tal Rune + Perfect Ruby
Blood Body: Magic Torso Armor + Jewel + Thul Rune + Perfect Ruby
Blood Boots: Magic Boots + Jewel + Eth Rune + Perfect Ruby
Blood Gloves: Magic Gloves + Jewel + Nef Rune + Perfect Ruby
Blood Helm: Magic Circlet + Jewel + Ral Rune + Perfect Ruby

Blood Ring: Magic Ring + Jewel + Sol Rune + Perfect Ruby
Blood Shield: Magic Shield + Jewel + Ith Rune + Perfect Ruby
